## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Testing

- [ ] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] I have added new tests for this change (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style (ES modules, JSDoc, etc.)
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README, FAQ, AGENTS.md) if needed
- [ ] I have checked that `npm run lint` passes without errors
- [ ] I have tested with `LOG_LEVEL=debug` if relevant

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes

Any additional information that reviewers should know:
- Dependencies added/removed
- Migration steps required
- Breaking changes
